/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/djvureader.dir/djvureader_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/djvureader.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/djvureader.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/djvureader.dir/src/djvuview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/djvureader.dir/src/pagerenderer.cpp.o -o djvureader -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
